# Transcript
AIST
**ANGEILEI
N KAKEINOI* **
OGHN THS *ROYR*
*MOY KAI TOIS A*
*RESBESIN EISMY
*HN TWN TEICWN OIK*
*TOYYPETIQEIKAI
NTAS KAI TWN EM MY
*N IEROMNHMONOS *
Y ALAIEA KAI ARCEN
N KAI TOYS ALLOYS T
*AS *N TEI *OLEI THI
ONOS TOY PAR ANTIGO
*O KAI DIESWISEN KA
IS MYR*NAN KAI FI
ARGEA EN BYZANTI
PAGOMENON EN TO
*NTASK


# Lines: x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4
